subscribe_to_event_type: subscribe to a specific EventType on the EventBus with an async handler function
subscribe_to_all_events: subscribe to all events on the EventBus with a single catch-all handler
publish_event_async: publish an Event to the EventBus asynchronously notifying all subscribed handlers
publish_event_sync: publish an Event to the EventBus synchronously from a non-async context
subscribe_once_to_event: subscribe to a single occurrence of an EventType that auto-unsubscribes after firing
